title: Evaluación de testing, costos y contratos

strengths: Centraliza 84 contratos declarativos y valida estructura mediante schema.
Distingue global-state, quality-gate, feature, historical-sprint, integration y ui-smoke.
Mantiene comandos recomendados para checks críticos y permite quality-gate hardening.
Reduce drift documental post-H al separar estado global mutable de contratos históricos.
limitations: Registry v1 está dominado por contratos históricos documentales: 78 de 84.
Muchos tests funcionales existentes no están mapeados a contratos, especialmente seguridad, agentes, API, observabilidad, conectores y plugins.
Impact analyzer es conservador: para src/devpilot_core/policy/engine.py recomienda pytest completo por falta de mapeo contractual.
No modela aún criticidad P0/P1/P2/P3, costo esperado, dominio, riesgo, owner de dominio ni triggers de ejecución.

execution_tiers.always: P0/P1 rápido: seguridad, estado global, contratos, registry, hardening sin pytest implícito.
execution_tiers.impact: Tests seleccionados por watched_paths y dominios asociados.
execution_tiers.release: Suites amplias, smoke UI, históricos documentales, release artifacts y regressions pesadas.
execution_tiers.manual_or_nightly: Pruebas costosas, e2e futuras, integración UI/API real y datasets grandes.

mandatory_questions.critical_security_tests: PolicyEngine, ApprovalPolicyChecker, RBAC/identity, PathGuard, SecretGuard, PromptInjectionGuard, ToolInjectionGuard, remote disabled, connector write denied and plugin execution denied.
mandatory_questions.historical_documental_tests: tests/test_sprint_*_documentation.py and documentation manifest tests; they preserve sprint history but should not be confused with runtime safety coverage.
mandatory_questions.product_tests: UI/API, visual smoke, report/trace viewer, settings, approval center and release dry-run tests.
mandatory_questions.always_run_tests: P0/P1 fast tests: project global state, test contract registry, test impact, post-H eval artifact tests, hardening gate, industrial readiness and security-deny tests.
mandatory_questions.impact_tests: Tests mapped by Test Contract Registry v2 watched paths and domain triggers; today impact analyzer is too sparse.
mandatory_questions.release_only_tests: Full pytest, historical documentation sweep, UI smoke, release/audit-pack/compliance-pack integrity, advanced evals and future e2e suites.
mandatory_questions.poorly_mapped_domains: PolicyEngine internals, approval/RBAC, API security, agent runtime, RAG, connectors, plugins, multiworkspace, observability and release are underrepresented in registry v1 watched paths.

decisions.decision: No asumir que cantidad alta de tests equivale a cobertura industrial.
Promover Test Contract Registry 2.0 antes de depender del impact analyzer para cambios de dominio crítico.
Separar ejecución always, impact, release y manual/nightly para controlar costo de regresión.
P0 debe priorizar seguridad, guards, RBAC, approval, remote disabled y writes denegados.
POST-H-002 debe consumir métricas de testing/costo como parte del dashboard de madurez.
